mapper.select: SELECT tariff_id AS tariffId, tariff_name AS tariffName, price AS price, duration_month AS durationMonth, description AS description FROM tariffs WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY price ASC
SELECT tariff_id AS tariffId, tariff_name AS tariffName, price AS price, duration_month AS durationMonth, description AS description FROM tariffs WHERE tariff_id = #{tariffId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
